footer.tagline: Own land. Live well. Start in Romania.
footer.bottom: Curated rural homes. Verified paperwork. Full buying support.
common.generalAreaNotice: General area shown. Exact location shared with qualified buyers.
hero.headline: What if your family's next chapter started with land, silence and mountain air?
hero.subheadline: We help international buyers find verified rural estates in Romania - and guide the full journey from first call to notary, keys and life after purchase.
hero.trustLine: Curated rural homes. Verified paperwork. Full buying support.
home.pain.title: Maybe life in the city still works. But does it still feel right?
home.pain.line1: You have the house. The job. The routine.
home.pain.line5: And every year, real freedom feels further away.
home.pain.question1: What would life look like with more land?
home.pain.close: In rural Romania, that life still exists.
home.dream.title: A slower life. A stronger family. A home with land.
home.dream.line1: Wake up to hills, forests or mountains.
home.dream.line2: Drink coffee in your own garden.
home.dream.line3: Grow food your children can pick with their hands.
home.dream.line4: Keep animals, if the property and local rules allow it.
home.dream.line5: Work online from a quiet home, then step outside into real nature.
home.dream.quote: This is not about escaping life. It is about choosing a better one.
home.why.title: Because Europe still has places that feel alive.
home.why.card1.title: Land still means something
home.why.card1.body: In many parts of rural Romania, homes come with gardens, orchards, barns, fields or forest edges. Space is not a luxury fantasy. It is real.
home.why.card2.title: Old-world beauty, modern connection
home.why.card2.body: Romania has some of Europe's fastest fixed broadband speeds, making many areas attractive for remote work and digital entrepreneurs.
home.why.card3.title: Nature you can feel every day
home.why.card3.body: The Carpathians, submontane villages, forests, rivers, mineral springs and open countryside create a way of life that feels healthier and more grounded.
home.why.card4.title: An undervalued rural market
home.why.card4.body: Compared to many Western European regions, rural Romania still offers rare properties, large plots and long-term upside.
home.why.card5.title: A life closer to the land
home.why.card5.body: Gardens, animals, orchards, firewood, wells, barns and seasonal food are still part of everyday rural life in many Romanian villages.
home.why.card6.title: A guided path, not a blind leap
home.why.card6.body: You do not need to understand Romania alone. We guide the search, paperwork, travel, legal steps and post-purchase transition.
home.properties.title: Curated rural properties. Not endless listings.
home.properties.body: We do not list every house we find. We select properties with real lifestyle potential, strong character and verified paperwork.
home.services.title: From first call to keys in hand - we stay with you.
home.services.body: Buying in another country can feel risky. Different language. Different rules. Unknown people. Unknown paperwork. That is why our role is simple: we make the process feel clear, safe and guided.
home.process.title: A simple 5-step path to owning rural property in Romania.
home.process.step1.title: Private Consultation
home.process.step1.body: We learn what kind of life you want, your budget, your timeline and your non-negotiables.
home.process.step2.title: Curated Shortlist
home.process.step2.body: We show you selected properties that match your lifestyle, not random listings.
home.process.step3.title: Romania Visit
home.process.step3.body: We help with airport pickup, accommodation and private property tours.
home.process.step4.title: Legal & Notary Process
home.process.step4.body: Our trusted legal and notary partners help verify the property and move the process forward.
home.process.step5.title: Keys & Aftercare
home.process.step5.body: After purchase, we help you settle in, connect with local services and understand what comes next.
home.trust.title: Local knowledge. Old relationships. Modern standards.
home.trust.p1: Romanian Heritage Estates is built by a family with deep real estate experience in Romania.
home.trust.p2: Our founding team includes people who worked in Romanian real estate from the late 1990s to 2010, closing many transactions and building long-standing relationships with notaries, legal professionals and local property owners.
home.trust.p3: Today, we combine that local knowledge with modern international marketing, buyer education and a premium concierge process for foreign clients.
home.trust.bullet1: Family real estate background since the late 1990s
home.trust.bullet3: Verified cadastral and ownership documents before listing
home.trust.bullet6: Guidance before, during and after purchase
home.faq.title: You may be wondering...
home.faq.a1: Many international buyers are surprised by how peaceful Romanian rural life can feel. As with any country, safety depends on the region, village and property. We help you understand the area before you decide.
home.faq.q2: Can foreigners buy property in Romania?
home.faq.a2: In many cases, yes, but the process depends on citizenship, property type and land structure. We guide buyers through the right legal path with trusted specialists.
home.faq.q3: Can I work remotely from rural Romania?
home.faq.a3: Romania is known for strong internet infrastructure, and many areas offer excellent fixed broadband. We check connectivity as part of the property review.
home.faq.q4: Will I see the exact property location online?
home.faq.a4: No. To protect owners and buyers, we show the general area. Exact details are shared during the qualified buyer process.
home.faq.q5: Do you help after the purchase?
home.faq.a5: Yes. We can help with utilities, local contacts, renovation partners, translation, practical setup and settling in.
home.guide.title: Not ready to buy yet? Start with the guide.
home.guide.body: Download our free guide for international buyers and learn what to know before buying a rural property in Romania.
home.guide.cta: Book a Private Consultation & Get the Guide
home.guide.name: The International Buyer's Guide to Rural Property in Romania
home.guide.item7: How to plan your first visit
home.final.title: Your rural life in Romania does not have to start with confusion.
home.final.body: Tell us what kind of life you want. We will help you understand if Romania is the right place to build it.
